purpose: Ship Veritas V1 — curated understanding system demonstrating concept-driven synthesis with tier-aware sources
core_principle: Veritas is a career project, not an architecture project. Its job is to make you legible as an Applied AI Systems Engineer.

validated_subjects.tier_coverage: All 9 subjects validated with strong tier 2/3 support (3-5+ sources each)
validated_subjects.first_topic_rationale: Strongest 3-layer separation (spec → interpretation → friction), real implementation gap, systematic failure modes

architectural_boundaries.backend_role: Retrieval engine - provides evidence, not synthesis
architectural_boundaries.adapter_role: Format bridge - transforms retrieval results to UI contract
adapter_provides: Data transformation (backend format → Replit UI format)

v1_definition_of_done.description: V1 is DONE when you can record a 2-3 minute demo video showing:
requirements: Open the app at a public URL
Ask a question about developer docs
System shows answer with inline citations
System shows sources grouped by tier (Docs / Practice / Failure)
System shows trust signal: Docs sufficient / Docs partial / Docs insufficient
Explain how system works in 30 seconds

execution_invariants.rule: V1 must ship before any new infrastructure work
No live web search in V1 — manual corpus only
Hardcoded scoring logic is allowed in V1
Working demo is required before any UI polish
Demo video is part of V1 definition of done
Source tier metadata must survive entire pipeline
Backend provides retrieval/evidence, not concept synthesis
Replit UI format (ideas[] + sources{}) is canonical for demo

phases.name: Planning & Setup
phases.completion_criteria: Directory exists, repo initialized, spine committed

phases.name: Corpus & Retrieval
deliverables: Claude docs ingested with tier tags
phases.completion_criteria: Can query and get back docs with tier tags

phases.name: Answer Generation
phases.completion_criteria: Can ask question and get answer with working citation links

actual_implementation.output_format: Single answer text with [1][2] citations + citation metadata
actual_implementation.note: Outputs single-answer format, not concept-driven ideas[] format

phases.name: Eval Scoring
phases.completion_criteria: Answer shows 4 scores and trust signal

actual_implementation.status: Scoring logic exists but not integrated into UI

phases.name: Core UI (Mock Mode)
deliverables: Mock mode functional with adapter layer
phases.completion_criteria: Can use the app end-to-end in browser with mock data

actual_implementation.verification: Phase A+B complete - all interactions functional

phases.name: Backend Integration
phases.completion_criteria: Can ask question, backend retrieves, adapter transforms, UI displays
remaining_work: Enhance adapter with backend response transformation
Replace mock mode with API calls

phases.name: Trace & History
phases.completion_criteria: Can view trace and see past runs
allowed_shortcuts: In-memory history is fine for V1
Replay can be deferred to V2 if needed

phases.name: Demo & Launch
phases.completion_criteria: Demo video exists, app is live, repo is public
allowed_shortcuts: Screen recording with voiceover is fine

success_criteria.demo_quality: 2-3 minute video clearly showing concept-driven synthesis with tier-aware sources
success_criteria.career_impact: Can say 'I built Veritas' in interviews with demo link

what_this_project_proves.for_anthropic: Eval design, epistemic honesty, transparency, concept synthesis
what_this_project_proves.for_perplexity: Retrieval + citations, answer quality, product UI
what_this_project_proves.for_startups: Can ship working systems, not just architecture
what_this_project_proves.for_you: You are an Applied AI Systems Engineer who builds and ships

one_sentence_pitch: I built a concept-driven AI answer engine for developer documentation that synthesizes official docs, observed practice, and documented failures into unified concepts with inline citations, tier-aware source classification, and eval scoring

reality_check.this_is_not: An architecture project, a research project, a perfect system
reality_check.this_is: A career project that makes you legible as an Applied AI Systems Engineer

immediate: Enhance adapter to transform backend response → ideas[] format
Replace mock mode with API calls
